description: A piece of machinery has reached the end of its life and needs to be formally retired and removed from the asset register.

nodes.task_description: Find the asset in the maintenance management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully locates the correct asset record.

nodes.task_description: Verify that there are no open work orders or outstanding PMs for the asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there is no pending work on the asset.

nodes.task_description: Change the asset's status to 'Retired' and enter the date of disposal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retires the asset, removing it from active service and maintenance plans.
